overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a dark underground market settlement. The player moves from a vehicle storage area up to an upper walkway overlooking a bustling neon-lit market, passes a bar area, and descends back to the crowded ground floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle storage bay with covered car

agents.ego_description: walking around a covered vehicle in a dimly lit storage area

entered.detail: futuristic car covered with silver tarp and dust
industrial workbench with tools and equipment
illuminated green exit sign mounted on wall
green metal staircase leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit industrial storage bay. A futuristic vehicle covered with a silver tarp occupies the center space, surrounded by metal workbenches and industrial shelving. The camera moves around the vehicle, examining the space, with a green exit sign visible in the background marking the staircase.

events.description: begins ascending metal staircase from ground floor

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal stairs to the upper level

entered.detail: green painted metal handrail along staircase
rough concrete walls with graffiti and wear

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto the metal staircase and begins ascending. The green metal railings line the left side while concrete walls pass by on the left. The ground floor vehicle bay falls behind as the camera climbs toward the upper level.

events.description: emerges onto upper walkway revealing large market hall below
brighter neon lighting from market stalls becomes visible below

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper railing overlooking the bustling market below

notable_agents.action: character leaning on railing looking down at market activity

entered.detail: safety railing along walkway edge overlooking lower level
large open market hall with multiple stalls and crowds
various colored neon signs illuminating the market below

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the upper walkway, the scene opens into a vast multi-level market hall. Neon lights glow from stalls below while the camera moves along the metal railing. An NPC leans on the railing to the right, observing the crowd. Industrial scaffolding and hanging cables frame the view of the bustling market floor.

events.description: approaches bar area with bright red vending machine
character leans on bar counter looking at bartender

agents.ego_description: approaching the bar and observing the bartender behind the counter

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the white counter
customer sitting at table near the vending machine

entered.detail: bright red vending machine with illuminated product display
long white bar counter with neon lighting above
circular neon sign with red and green concentric rings

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a bar area marked by a bright red vending machine on the left. The character approaches the white bar counter where a bartender stands ready. A circular neon sign glows on the right wall. The market is still visible in the background to the right, while a customer sits at a nearby table.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded market floor with various stalls

events.description: begins descending metal stairs to ground floor
reaches ground floor and enters the crowded market area

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs and moving through the crowded market floor

entered.detail: metal staircase leading down to the market floor
ground level of the market with concrete flooring
large support pillars throughout the market space

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the bar and begins descending the metal stairs to the ground floor. Upon reaching the bottom, the scene opens into the crowded market floor filled with NPCs walking between stalls. Industrial pillars line the left side while neon signs illuminate the bustling commercial area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded industrial storage bay up to a vibrant, neon-lit market overlook before descending back into the crowded commercial hub. It begins by circling a tarp-covered futuristic vehicle amidst metal workbenches and shelving, moving toward a green exit sign that leads to a staircase. As the camera ascends the metal stairs, the dim storage bay falls away, eventually emerging onto an upper walkway that opens into a vast multi-level hall framed by scaffolding and hanging cables. The scene then shifts into a bar area characterized by a bright red vending machine and a glowing circular sign, before the camera turns away from the bartender to descend the stairs once more. Finally, the movement concludes on the ground floor, where the environment expands into a bustling market filled with NPCs and illuminated by vivid neon signs.
